_meta.purpose: Canonical translation glossary for behavior_lens.* keys. Used by check_translation_quality.cjs (CI guard) and any future build_language_pack / re-translation passes. Lessons captured from the 2026-06-04 303-agent accuracy audit + the 2026-06-04/05 fix passes.

preserve_verbatim._note: These tokens MUST stay byte-identical in every target-language translation. The translation-quality CI guard treats their presence as a non-issue (won't count toward English-density flags).

aba_term_glosses._note: These English clinical terms have non-obvious meanings. Translators MUST use these senses, NOT literal dictionary glosses. Format: english_term: { sense, anti_pattern (what NOT to translate it as) }

Acting-Out Cycle.sense: Colvin's escalation cycle of disruptive/explosive behavior (calm → trigger → agitation → acceleration → peak → de-escalation → recovery).
Acting-Out Cycle.anti_pattern: drama/theater/expression/performance — these were 2026-06-04 audit defects in lao + acholi

Fidelity.sense: Treatment fidelity = degree of adherence to a behavior plan as written / as designed.
Fidelity.anti_pattern: moral honesty/loyalty — was a 2026-06-04 audit defect in lao (คວາਡສື່ສັດ = honesty)

Reinforcement Inventory.sense: Structured survey/list of items that function as reinforcers for a given student.
Reinforcement Inventory.anti_pattern: goods warehouse/stockroom — was a 2026-06-04 audit defect in lao (ສາງສິນຄ້າ = warehouse)

Replacement Behavior.sense: Alternative socially-acceptable behavior that meets the same function as the target behavior to reduce.

Antecedent.sense: Stimulus / event preceding a behavior (the A in ABC).

Consequence.sense: Stimulus / event following a behavior (behavioral sense — NOT moral/punitive sense, NOT karma).

Real-time.anti_pattern: literal-time / authentic-time; AND no hyphenated stubs like Real-iien (marshallese pipeline bug)

Caseload.sense: Set of students under a single clinician's care.

Inter-Observer Agreement (IOA).sense: Reliability statistic for behavioral observations across two or more observers.

Wizard.anti_pattern: sorcerer/magician/occult — was a 2026-06-04 audit defect in maay_maay (Saaxir)

Data.anti_pattern: Matter — was a 2026-06-04 audit defect across dozens of acholi keys

Off-task.sense: Engaging in any behavior other than the assigned task during instruction time.

preserve_anti_patterns._note: Lexical patterns that have been observed as bugs from older build pipelines. The CI guard flags any string containing these in any pack.

calques.context_hint: not as a verb 'to matter' — as a NOUN for Data

conservative_principle._note: When no clean target-language equivalent exists for a clinical ABA term, KEEP the English clinical term verbatim with target-language framing (parenthetical gloss). DO NOT invent neologisms. Confident-but-wrong native invention is worse than mixed-English-clinical, because it misleads a teacher reading the UI in their family's language and gives them a false-confident translation of a clinical concept.
conservative_principle.example_good: Coo gin ma okwongo (antecedent), kit me tim (behavior), ki gin ma olubo (consequence) — acholi keeps the technical English term in parens.
conservative_principle.example_bad: Cawa me Pweyo (back-translates to 'time of unclear') — invented confident wrong rendering of 'Acting-Out Cycle'.
